name: Submareed Tour Ride
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>游</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>覧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>艇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>サブマリード
desc: The first Normal Monster you control that would be destroyed by battle or card effect each turn, is not destroyed. If you control a Normal Monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Submareed Tour Ride" once per turn.
mnst_eff: The first Normal Monster you control that would be destroyed by battle or card effect each turn, is not destroyed. If you control a Normal Monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Submareed Tour Ride" once per turn.
eff: The first Normal Monster you control that would be destroyed by battle or card effect each turn, is not destroyed. If you control a Normal Monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Submareed Tour Ride" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
misc: Requires control of specific Monster type
